_meta.note: This file is the canonical source of truth for all DDL brand tokens. No product code should hardcode a color that exists here. Reference this file.

navy.role: Primary background. The floor. Never override.

card.role: Card / surface. Slightly lighter than navy.

card2.role: Alternative card. Between navy and card.

rules: No Inter. No system fonts. No Roboto.
Space Grotesk for all UI display.
JetBrains Mono for all data, code, IDs, timestamps.
Source Serif 4 for all long-form prose.
Dark mode is not a mode. It is the default.

ddl.name: Dropdown Logistics
ddl.mark: DD stamp — crimson ring, cream DD, copper dots, cardinal marks

auditforge.name: AuditForge
auditforge.accentNote: Shares DDL crimson intentionally. AuditForge is the flagship DDL product — it carries the bloodline color.
auditforge.mark: AF stamp — crimson fill, cream AF monogram, copper dots at 9/3 o'clock

blindspot.name: BlindSpot
blindspot.studioNote: D = Dave, A = Alex, & = the collaboration. The ampersand is structural.

accentProduct.name: Dave Green
accentProduct.context: Used inside the BlindSpot product UI, OrbitalHero, interactive elements.

accentStudio.name: Amber
accentStudio.context: Used when DDL site references BlindSpot from outside. D&A Analytics brand contexts.

accentSecondary.name: Alex Green
accentSecondary.context: Secondary helix strand. Two cousins. Do not flatten to a single green.

backgroundOverride.name: D&A Navy
backgroundOverride.note: Deeper than DDL navy #0D1B2A. The product is a data terminal, not a studio site. Do not normalize.

blindspot.colorRule: Green = you are inside the product. Amber = DDL is referencing the product from outside.
blindspot.footerCanon: built by two people who share actual DNA
blindspot.mark: Helix mark — DNA double-helix, #22C55E + #86EFAC strands, #E2E8F0 rungs
blindspot.markStatus: finalized — documented exception to stamp system
blindspot.markException: BlindSpot is a consumer sports analytics product. The stamp reads institutional. The helix reads data/intelligence. Exception ratified by operator.

knowledgeVault.name: DDL Knowledge Vault
knowledgeVault.tagline: The corpus has a front door now.
knowledgeVault.ogStrategy: Static PNG — no server-side rendering available
knowledgeVault.mark: KV stamp seal — teal ring, cream KV monogram, dashed inner ring, cardinal marks

dexJr.name: Dex Jr.
dexJr.nameNote: Always with the period after Jr. Never DexJr.
dexJr.receiptLine: Dex Jr. — Local Intelligence Engine · Seat 1010 · DexVerse
dexJr.mark: Circuit node mark — concentric rings (corpus layers), cardinal traces (retrieval paths), center dot (model)

dexverse.name: DexVerse
dexverse.accentNote: Shares violet with Dex Jr. DexVerse is the wing; Dex Jr. is the infrastructure within it.

accentLocalNode.name: Violet Light
accentLocalNode.use: Dex Jr. / Seat 1010 distinction in all council visualizations

dexverse.mark: Council Constellation — DV monogram, 10 seat dots on council ring (r=46), circuit traces, 4 rings total
dexverse.markDescription: Extends DDL stamp system with: council ring (r=46, 10 evenly-spaced seat dots at 36° intervals), corpus ring (r=34), cardinal circuit traces. Seat 1010 renders in violet-light #A98FE0 to distinguish local node. Cathedral work — do not simplify.

canonpress.name: CanonPress

accent.name: Crimson
accent.note: Inherited from DDL. CanonPress is a DDL publication — the bloodline color applies.

canonpress.substack: D.K. Hale — external, Substack controls branding
canonpress.mark: No stamp currently. Inherits DDL mark.

theBench.name: The Bench
taglineCandidates: Software tips for people who build things.
theBench.mark: Inherits DDL stamp. No separate mark.

excelligence.name: Excelligence

accent.name: Gold
accent.note: Resolved 2026-03-15. Differentiated from D&A Amber #C49A3C. Gold reads Excel/spreadsheet/knowledge without conflicting with the analytics amber.

excelligence.mark: No stamp. Force-directed graph explorer IS the visual centerpiece.

workbench.name: WorkBench

accent.name: Crimson
accent.context: DDL voice on the DDL site (dropdownlogistics.com/workbench).

workbench.tagline: You're not buying a suite. You're building a stack.
workbench.fonts: Inherits DDL — Space Grotesk / JetBrains Mono / Source Serif 4.
workbench.substrate: FactLayer — immutable event log + derived dimensions

display.use: Headlines, nav, labels, buttons, all UI text

data.use: IDs, metadata, timestamps, code, mono labels, corpus counts

marks.reductionMark: 32px and below: monogram only, single outer ring, no arc text

blindspot.rationale: Consumer sports analytics product demands intelligence/data visual register, not institutional stamp.

structure.arms: 5 for product pages, 8 for hub pages
structure.nodes: Filled dots, accent color, label cards with product accent border at 0.25 opacity
structure.receiptLine: Always last. Always mono. Always subdued.

template.bottomBar: 1px border-top, studio name left, methodology right

changes: Initial release — synthesized from BRAND-INV-001, BRAND-INTAKE-001, PRO-BRANDING-001
DDL monogram locked as DD (KnowledgeVaultPM confirmation — live in landing v4)
AuditForge tagline locked: 'The audit package generates itself.'
Excelligence accent resolved: Gold #D4A843 (differentiated from D&A Amber #C49A3C)
CanonPress accent: Crimson inherited from DDL (publication tied to studio)
CanonPress series colors assigned: Converge Blue, RedLine Crimson, DeepCut Violet, GroundTruth Amber
BlindSpot inside/outside color rule documented for first time
Violet ramp added for DexVerse/Dex Jr. (050 through 700)
DexVerse mark flagged as cathedral work — dedicated session required
